CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, date_column DATE);
SELECT id, weekofyear(date_column) AS week FROM test_dates WHERE date_column BETWEEN DATE '1992-01-01' AND DATE '2023-12-31';

SELECT a.id, weekofyear(a.date_column) AS week, b.additional_info FROM test_dates a JOIN (SELECT 'Info' AS additional_info, weekofyear(DATE '2023-01-07') AS week_value) b ON week_value = weekofyear(a.date_column);
SELECT id, weekofyear(date_column) AS week FROM (SELECT date_column, id FROM test_dates WHERE id > 1) AS filtered_dates;
SELECT DISTINCT weekofyear(date_column) FROM (SELECT date_column FROM test_dates UNION SELECT DATE '1999-02-01') AS union_dates;
CREATE TABLE additional_info (info_id INT, week_number INT);
SELECT d.id, weekofyear(d.date_column) AS week, a.info_id FROM test_dates d LEFT JOIN additional_info a ON weekofyear(d.date_column) = a.week_number;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS number_of_weeks FROM (SELECT DISTINCT weekofyear(date_column) FROM test_dates) AS weekly_counts;
SELECT case when weekofyear(date_column) BETWEEN 1 AND 52 then 'Valid Week' else 'Invalid Week' end AS week_validation FROM test_dates;
